title: Soldat Bom
writer: Paul Baudisch, Adolf Schütz, Nils Poppe
actors: Nils Poppe, Gunnar Björnstrand, Julia Cæsar
plot: The station-master Fabian Bom is a very meticulous person, and he makes sure that the train leaves exactly - on the second. To him, nothing could be more important than duty, efficiency and punctuality, in fact, his sense of duty ...
